name: LV_323_QCPARAMCHECK
definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[LV_323_QCPARAMCHECK] AS
select 1 AS GRPCODE,
    0 AS TRCODE,
    0 AS INVOICE,
    VALUE AS PARAMOK
from "TIGER3"..L_FIRMPARAMS
where CODE = 'QCONT_INSPPURCHINPUTS' AND FIRMNR = 323
UNION ALL
select 1 AS GRPCODE,
    0 AS TRCODE,
    1 AS INVOICE,
    VALUE AS PARAMOK
from "TIGER3"..L_FIRMPARAMS
where CODE = 'QCONT_INSPPURCHINVO' AND FIRMNR = 323
UNION ALL
select 2 AS GRPCODE,
    0 AS TRCODE,
    0 AS INVOICE,
    VALUE AS PARAMOK
from "TIGER3"..L_FIRMPARAMS
where CODE = 'QCONT_INSPSALEOUTPUTS' AND FIRMNR = 323
UNION ALL
select 2 AS GRPCODE,
    0 AS TRCODE,
    1 AS INVOICE,
    VALUE AS PARAMOK
from "TIGER3"..L_FIRMPARAMS
where CODE = 'QCONT_INSPSALESINVO' AND FIRMNR = 323
UNION ALL
select 0 AS GRPCODE,
    11 AS TRCODE,
    0 AS INVOICE,
    VALUE AS PARAMOK
from "TIGER3"..L_FIRMPARAMS
where CODE = 'QCONT_INSPUSAGESLIPS' AND FIRMNR = 323
UNION ALL
select 0 AS GRPCODE,
    12 AS TRCODE,
    0 AS INVOICE,

from "TIGER3"..L_FIRMPARAMS
where CODE = 'QCONT_INSPUSAGESLIPS' AND FIRMNR = 323
UNION ALL

where CODE = 'QCONT_INSPPRODINPUTS' AND FIRMNR = 323
UNION ALL
select 0 AS GRPCODE,
    14 AS TRCODE,
    0 AS INVOICE,
    VALUE AS PARAMOK
from "TIGER3"..L_FIRMPARAMS
where CODE = 'QCONT_OPENINGSLIPS' AND FIRMNR = 323
UNION ALL
select 0 AS GRPCODE,
    15 AS TRCODE,
    0 AS INVOICE,
    VALUE AS PARAMOK
from "TIGER3"..L_FIRMPARAMS
where CODE = 'QCONT_INSPDEFINPSLIPS' AND FIRMNR = 323
UNION ALL
select 0 AS GRPCODE,
    16 AS TRCODE,
    0 AS INVOICE,
    VALUE AS PARAMOK
from "TIGER3"..L_FIRMPARAMS
where CODE = 'QCONT_INSPDEFINPSLIPS' AND FIRMNR = 323
UNION ALL
select 0 AS GRPCODE,
    17 AS TRCODE,
    0 AS INVOICE,
    VALUE AS PARAMOK
from "TIGER3"..L_FIRMPARAMS
where CODE = 'QCONT_INSPDEFINPSLIPS' AND FIRMNR = 323
UNION ALL
select 0 AS GRPCODE,
    18 AS TRCODE,
    0 AS INVOICE,
    VALUE AS PARAMOK
from "TIGER3"..L_FIRMPARAMS
where CODE = 'QCONT_INSPDEFINPSLIPS' AND FIRMNR = 323
UNION ALL
select 0 AS GRPCODE,
    19 AS TRCODE,
    0 AS INVOICE,
    VALUE AS PARAMOK
from "TIGER3"..L_FIRMPARAMS
where CODE = 'QCONT_INSPDEFINPSLIPS' AND FIRMNR = 323
UNION ALL
select 0 AS GRPCODE,
    20 AS TRCODE,
    0 AS INVOICE,
    VALUE AS PARAMOK
from "TIGER3"..L_FIRMPARAMS
where CODE = 'QCONT_INSPDEFOUTSLIPS' AND FIRMNR = 323
UNION ALL
select 0 AS GRPCODE,
    21 AS TRCODE,
    0 AS INVOICE,
    VALUE AS PARAMOK
from "TIGER3"..L_FIRMPARAMS
where CODE = 'QCONT_INSPDEFOUTSLIPS' AND FIRMNR = 323
UNION ALL
select 0 AS GRPCODE,
    22 AS TRCODE,

    VALUE AS PARAMOK
from "TIGER3"..L_FIRMPARAMS
where CODE = 'QCONT_INSPDEFOUTSLIPS' AND FIRMNR = 323
UNION ALL
select 0 AS GRPCODE,

where CODE = 'QCONT_INSPDEFOUTSLIPS' AND FIRMNR = 323
UNION ALL

from "TIGER3"..L_FIRMPARAMS
where CODE = 'QCONT_INSPDEFOUTSLIPS' AND FIRMNR = 323
UNION ALL
select 0 AS GRPCODE,

where CODE = 'QCONT_INSPWHTRANSFERS' AND FIRMNR = 323
